title: Flaky French Noodle Dish
description: A savory and molten French dish from Lyon, featuring vermicelli rice noodles, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware and wrapped in a corn husk, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Cook the vermicelli rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the duck fat over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, mushroom mixture, chicken broth, thyme, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Spoon the noodle mixture into a ttukbaegi earthenware and cover with a corn husk wrap.
Bake the dish in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the corn husk is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
